default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Swoogo's blog performance, SEO strategy, and refocus content efforts on event registration and management keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog performance shows 5x increase in clicks (945 to 5,000) and 10x increase in impressions (70k to 750k) since July](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Focus shift: Prioritize content on event registration and management keywords (40+ articles in December) to improve rankings](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Event planning keyword difficulty decreased from 84 to 49, but event registration (51%) and management (58%) need attention](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Only 2 leads directly sourced from blogs in the last 3 months; team aims to increase qualified traffic and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

## Topics

### Blog Performance Metrics

  - [169 articles published, 20 in progress (189-190 total by week's end)](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [500 clicks overall, 90% (1,400 clicks) from GrowthX articles](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [5,000 clicks in November (5x increase from July's 945)](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Impressions up 10x: 70k in July to 750k in November](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [December historically shows 40-50% decrease in clicks/impressions vs. November](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

### SEO Strategy Shift

  - [Team to focus on event registration and management keywords (40+ articles in December)](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Event planning keyword difficulty decreased from 84 to 49](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Event registration (51% difficulty) and management (58% difficulty) need attention](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Stacey requests all 40 December articles focus on registration to impact next 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Planning and Reporting

  - [Prateek to share comprehensive list of event registration, planning, and management topics](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Team to create 60 articles in December (40 new + 20 refreshed)](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Improve reporting to capture broader keyword impact (e.g., "how to create an event registration form")](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Consider competitor traffic growth comparisons for future board meetings](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Lead Generation and Traffic Quality

  - [2 leads directly sourced from blogs in last 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Team aims to drive more qualified traffic converting to MQLs](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Focus on ranking for event management and event registration keywords](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to share comprehensive list of event registration, planning, and management topics](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Shift focus to creating 60 articles on event registration and management in December](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Improve reporting methods to better capture keyword impact across related search terms](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - Rebecca to compile and share "hot takes" on registration topics
  - [Team to send summary in Slack channel for next week's meeting (Stacey absent due to leadership offsite)](https://fathom.video/share/dU12YsRSHLNgLSF_9Ny8xpNBLbwGLT9g?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

action_items.description: Intensify focus on event management & registration topic clusters in content strategy
Share top 20 keyword rankings, incl. weekly/monthly progress of 3 key phrases (event planning/registration/management)
Create comprehensive list of event registration, planning, management topics for future content
Focus on creating 40 articles about event registration for December
Develop more accurate, holistic report on performance of event registration & management content
Compile "hot takes"/one-liners about event registration for content ideas
